name: all_noise_return_empty
description: 7-day window; 3 results all off-topic or stale relative to a TSLA bull-thesis goal
userGoal: I hold a large TSLA position. Alert me when news challenges my bull thesis.

results.title: Best electric cars of 2026 — buyer's guide
results.snippet: Our top picks for EVs you can buy.

results.title: Top 10 EV charging apps
results.snippet: Essential apps for every EV driver.

results.title: How to detail your Tesla at home
results.snippet: DIY tips for a showroom shine.

criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a findings array
If any finding is returned at all, the EV buyer's guide is NOT included (published outside the 7-day window)

name: high_signal_regulatory
description: 7-day window; one fresh Reuters result directly challenging the user's bull thesis
userGoal: I hold a large TSLA position. Alert me when news challenges my bull thesis.

results.title: NHTSA opens formal investigation into Tesla Autopilot after 12 crashes
results.snippet: Formal investigation announced after crash reports.

criteria: findings array contains exactly 1 finding referencing the NHTSA investigation

name: stale_content_must_score_zero
description: 7-day window; a highly relevant but stale (>30 days) result — must score exactly 0.0
userGoal: Track new model releases from Anthropic and OpenAI.

results.title: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.7 with 1M context

criteria: findings array is empty OR the Anthropic result appears with relevanceScore exactly 0.0

name: duplicate_of_recent_finding
description: 7-day window; fresh result that is the same story as an already-reported finding

recentFindings.title: Fed holds rates steady at March meeting

results.title: Fed keeps interest rates unchanged after March FOMC

criteria: findings array does NOT include the WSJ article about the Fed March meeting

name: grouped_multi_source_story
description: 7-day window; same GPT-5 launch story from 3 outlets — must dedupe to 1 finding
userGoal: Monitor Anthropic and OpenAI for pricing changes or model releases.

results.title: OpenAI announces GPT-5 with new reasoning mode
OpenAI unveils GPT-5 at developer conference
GPT-5 launches with enhanced reasoning capabilities

criteria: findings array contains exactly 1 finding about the GPT-5 launch
That finding's sourceUrl is from one of the three provided sources

name: tangentially_related_low_score
description: 7-day window; fresh on-topic but thesis-irrelevant result
userGoal: I hold a large TSLA position. Alert me when news challenges my bull thesis.

results.title: Tesla opens new showroom in Portugal

criteria: findings array is empty OR the Portugal showroom finding has relevanceScore <= 0.4

name: cadence_elevate_breaking
description: 7-day window; 3 fresh high-signal competitor developments in the window
userGoal: Monitor Anthropic and OpenAI for competitive moves affecting our build/buy decision.

results.title: Anthropic cuts API prices by 40%
OpenAI announces new enterprise tier
Anthropic extends context to 2M tokens

criteria: findings array contains 3 findings, each with relevanceScore >= 0.7

name: cadence_relax_persistent_silence
description: 7-day window; broad goal with one only-tangentially-related industry roundup
userGoal: Track news about my boutique consulting firm in the press.

results.title: Top management consulting trends for 2026

name: primary_source_preferred_when_grouped
description: 7-day window; same FDA story from fda.gov and usatoday.com — must group and use primary source
userGoal: Monitor FDA drug approvals related to Alzheimer's treatment.

results.title: FDA approves new Alzheimer's drug lecanemab-2
Pharma giant wins FDA nod for Alzheimer's pill

criteria: findings array contains exactly 1 finding about the FDA approval
The finding's sourceUrl is on fda.gov (primary source preferred over usatoday.com)

name: no_publish_date_old_context
description: 7-day window; result with no published date but title references 2023 events

results.title: Tesla faced early 2023 Autopilot scrutiny
results.snippet: A look back at 2023 regulatory issues.

criteria: findings array is empty OR the finding has relevanceScore 0.0

name: classification_insight_vs_article
description: 7-day window; deep analysis piece with substantial original content
userGoal: Track AI agent architecture trends relevant to our build decisions.

results.title: The shift from chat to agents: a deep architectural analysis
results.snippet: Detailed breakdown of agent patterns with data from 50 teams.

criteria: findings array contains 1 finding referencing the deep analysis article

name: memory_create_new_fact
description: 7-day window; fresh finding reveals a durable fact worth remembering
userGoal: Track key executives at Anthropic and OpenAI.

results.title: Anthropic hires former Google VP as CPO
results.snippet: Jane Doe joins as Chief Product Officer.

criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with a memoryUpdates array
At least 1 memoryUpdate has action 'create' recording the CPO hire
findings array includes the hire with relevanceScore >= 0.5

name: memory_strengthen_confirmed
description: 7-day window; new finding confirms an existing judgment memory
userGoal: Track BYD's European expansion and its impact on Tesla.

memories.content: BYD's European expansion has been slower than expected in impacting Tesla share

results.title: BYD delays Hungarian plant opening by 6 months

criteria: At least 1 memoryUpdate has action 'strengthen' targeting memoryId 'mem_byd_europe_slow'
The strengthen update's confidence is greater than 0.7
findings array includes the Hungarian plant delay with relevanceScore >= 0.6

name: memory_weaken_contradicted
description: 7-day window; new finding contradicts an existing judgment memory

memories.content: Fed is leaning hawkish through Q2 2026

results.title: Powell signals rate cuts possible as soon as June

criteria: At least 1 memoryUpdate has action 'weaken' targeting memoryId 'mem_fed_hawkish'
The weaken update's confidence is less than 0.8
findings array includes the Powell statement with relevanceScore >= 0.7

name: empty_results_empty_findings
criteria: Returns a valid JSON object with findings and memoryUpdates arrays
memoryUpdates array has at most 1 entry (empty is preferred, one meta-observation acceptable)

name: mixed_ages_same_story
description: 7-day window; same story appears fresh from one source and stale from another — must group using fresh source

results.title: Stripe hit with CFPB inquiry over dispute handling — original report
results.snippet: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau opens inquiry.

results.title: Stripe CFPB inquiry: what merchants need to know
results.snippet: Follow-up coverage as new details emerge.

criteria: findings array contains at most 1 finding about the Stripe CFPB inquiry
If a finding is returned, its sourceUrl is bloomberg.com (the fresh source within the 7-day window), not reuters.com (stale)
No finding has a relevanceScore > 0 for the reuters.com article
